form.formComment: Missed the frame when sixth (22.55) at Q Lakeside at last run and returns here after a three-and-a-half months break. Looks a winning chance while fresh.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (25.97) when fourth over 457m at Q Lakeside in a OPEN. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Capalaba over 366m (20.32) beating Fighting Fair in Grade 6 on January 25. In winning form and must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and tighthead for racing room shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Produced a good effort last start to finish fourth over 600m at this track, beaten 2.25 lengths (35.28) behind Super Special in a Restricted WIN on March 29. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Finished second at big odds last time (31.05) over 550m at Q Lakeside. Drawn awkwardly. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.comment: Finished second at big odds last time (31.05) over 550m at Q Lakeside. Drawn awkwardly. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 600m in 34.79. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 600m at this track at Restricted WIN level. Looks up against it this time.

form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (30.21) at this track in a Grade 5. Lines up from box 7 for the first time. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Strong performance after racing just off the speed to win by half a length at Q Lakeside over 457m (26.16) beating Bruno's Star in Maiden on March 31. Can only be further improved and expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 4 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Mighty Shazam beaten 7 lengths (26.05) in a Grade 6. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.
